title: MXC Configuration
description: Configuration schema for MXC container execution engine. Defines the recommended config format. The parser also accepts legacy fields not listed here during the migration period.

version.description: MXC config schema version (semver). Current stable: '0.4.0-alpha'. Configs using promoted or experimental features should use '0.5.0-alpha'.

containment.description: Containment value to use for execution. Accepts both abstract intents ('process') and concrete backends ('appcontainer', 'windows_sandbox', 'lxc', 'microvm', 'wslc'). The native binary resolves abstract intents to a concrete backend at run time based on host capabilities. Note: 'windows_sandbox' and 'wslc' are experimental and require the --experimental CLI flag.

lifecycle.description: Container lifecycle settings shared across all backends.

destroyOnExit.description: Destroy the container after execution completes.

preservePolicy.description: If true, retain filesystem and network policies after execution. If false (default), policies are cleaned up on exit.

commandLine.description: Complete command line to execute (e.g., "python3 app.py").

timeout.description: Execution timeout in milliseconds. 0 = no timeout (infinite).

filesystem.description: Filesystem access policy. Shared across all backends.

readwritePaths.description: Paths the process can read and write.

readonlyPaths.description: Paths the process can read but not write.

deniedPaths.description: Paths the process cannot access at all.

network.description: Network access policy. Shared across all backends.

allowedHosts.description: Hostnames or IP/CIDR blocks to allow (when defaultPolicy is 'block'). Enforced by 'lxc' and 'appcontainer' containment backends.

blockedHosts.description: Hostnames or IP addresses to block (when defaultPolicy is 'allow'). Enforced by 'lxc' and 'appcontainer' containment backends.

proxy.description: Proxy configuration. Only supported with appcontainer backend.

localhost.description: Port of an external already running proxy on localhost.

builtinTestServer.description: Use WXC's built-in test proxy server. Mutually exclusive with localhost.

ui.description: Cross-platform UI policy. Mapped from SandboxPolicy.ui by createConfigFromPolicy.

disable.description: Whether UI is disabled (no visible windows).

appContainer.description: AppContainer-specific settings. Used when containment is 'appcontainer'.

isolation.description: UI isolation level for the desktop.

desktopSystemControl.description: Whether desktop system control is allowed.

ime.description: Whether IME (Input Method Editor) is allowed.

lxc.description: LXC-specific settings. Used when containment is 'lxc'.

distribution.description: Linux distribution for the container rootfs (e.g., 'alpine', 'ubuntu'). Required.

experimental.description: Experimental features. Only active when --experimental is passed.

test.description: Placeholder feature for testing experimental infrastructure.

message.description: Message to log when the feature is applied.

windows_sandbox.description: Windows Sandbox backend (experimental). Full VM isolation via a long-lived sandbox daemon.

idleTimeoutMs.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds before the daemon tears down the sandbox VM. 0 = no timeout.

daemonPipeName.description: Named pipe name the daemon listens on (without \\.\pipe\ prefix).

wslc.description: WSL Container (WSLC SDK) settings. Used when containment is 'wslc'.

targetOs.description: Target OS for the container. Currently only 'linux' is supported.

imageTarPath.description: Path to a local tar file to import as the container image. Supports both rootfs tars (from `docker export`) and Docker image archives (from `docker save`). When set, the image is imported from this file instead of pulling from a registry. The format is auto-detected: archives containing `manifest.json` are treated as Docker image format, archives with Linux root directories (bin/, etc/, usr/) are treated as rootfs tars, and unrecognized formats are rejected.

cpuCount.description: Number of CPUs allocated to the WSLC session. Omit for host-determined default.

memoryMb.description: Memory in MB allocated to the WSLC session. Omit for host-determined default.

gpu.description: Enable GPU passthrough to the container.

storagePath.description: Storage path for the WSLC session image store. Omit to use a temporary directory.
